title: Path Traversal — Broken Access Control
description: File paths constructed from user input without canonicalization allow directory traversal attacks, enabling access to files outside the intended scope (OWASP A01:2021 / CWE-22).

finding.message: Potential path traversal at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Canonicalize paths using realpath()/resolve() and verify the result is within an allowed base directory.
Maintain an explicit allowlist of accessible filenames or directories.
Never use user input directly as a file path; use an indirection layer (e.g., file ID → path mapping).
